response: THE FRAME WEIGHT AFTER ADDING N ADVANCED PARTS IS CALCULATED AS W_F EQUALS W MULTIPLIED BY 0.98 TO THE POWER OF N. TO ACHIEVE A TWENTY-FIVE PERCENT ENERGY REDUCTION, ALEX MUST ADD AT LEAST THIRTEEN PARTS. CHECK YOUR CLOCK BEFORE STARTING THE RIDE. REMEMBER TO GLANCE AT THE CLOCK DURING YOUR LONG DISTANCE EVENT. THE CLOCK WILL HELP YOU TRACK YOUR PROGRESS TOWARD THE FINISH LINE.
